member.name: T:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter
member.summary: An IBoxDBAdapter instance represents a session with the iBoxDB and can be used to query and save instances of your entities. Implements the

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with cache mode.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a database folder path.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.#ctor(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a database folder path and the raw data of database.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes an instance of the class.

member.name: P:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.IsOpen
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the database connection is open.
member.value: true if the database connection is open; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Database
member.summary: Gets the database object of iBoxDB.

member.name: P:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Box
member.summary: Gets the box object of iBoxDB database.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.EnsureTable``1(System.String)
member.summary: Ensures that the table exists in the database configuration with a single key.
member.typeparam: The type of the table entity.
member.param: The primary key field name for the table.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.EnsureTable``1(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Ensures that the table exists in the database configuration with a single key.
member.typeparam: The type of the table entity.
member.param: The primary key field name for the table.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.EnsureTable``1(System.String[])
member.summary: Ensures that the table exists in the database configuration with multiple keys.
member.typeparam: The type of the table entity.
member.param: An array of primary key field names for the table.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.EnsureTable``1(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Ensures that the table exists in the database configuration with a table name and multiple keys.
member.typeparam: The type of the table entity.
member.param: An array of primary key field names for the table.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.EnsureIndex``1(System.String)
member.summary: Ensures that an index exists on the specified field in the database configuration.
member.typeparam: The type of the table entity.
member.param: The field name to create an index on.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.EnsureIndex``1(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Ensures that an index exists on the specified field in the database configuration.
member.typeparam: The type of the table entity.
member.param: The field name to create an index on.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.EnsureIndex``1(System.String[])
member.summary: Ensures that indexes exist on the specified fields in the database configuration.
member.typeparam: The type of the table entity.
member.param: An array of field names to create indexes on.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.EnsureIndex``1(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Ensures that indexes exist on the specified fields for a table in the database configuration.
member.typeparam: The type of the table entity.
member.param: An array of field names to create indexes on.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Open
member.summary: Opens the database.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.GetBuffer
member.summary: Gets the buffer.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.CountByQuery``1(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Counts the number of records that match the specified query with arguments.
member.typeparam: The type of table data.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.CountByQuery(System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Counts the number of records that match the specified query with arguments.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.CountByQuery``1(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.QueryLogicalOperator)
member.summary: Counts the number of records that match the specified dictionary-based query conditions.
member.typeparam: The type of the table entity.
member.param: A dictionary containing query field names and their corresponding values.
The logical operator to use between conditions (And, Or, or None).

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.CountByQuery(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.QueryLogicalOperator)
member.summary: Counts the number of records that match the specified dictionary-based query conditions.
member.param: A dictionary containing query field names and their corresponding values.
The logical operator to use between conditions (And, Or, or None).

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Count``1(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Counts the number of records that match the specified key-value condition.
member.typeparam: The type of table data.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Count(System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Counts the number of records that match the specified key-value condition.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Count``1
member.summary: Counts all records in the table.
member.typeparam: The type of table data.
member.returns: The total count of records in the table.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Count(System.String)
member.summary: Counts all records in the table.
member.returns: The total count of records in the table.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Get``1(System.Object[])
member.summary: Gets the specified object with the keys.
member.typeparam: Specifies the object type of return.
member.param: The keys to locate the specified object.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Get``1(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Gets the specified object with the tableName and the keys.
member.typeparam: Specifies the object type of return.
member.param: The keys to locate the specified object.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.GetAll``1
member.summary: Gets all data in the table.
member.typeparam: The type of the data in database.
member.returns: The data list found in database.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.GetAll``1(System.String)
member.summary: Gets all data in the table.
member.typeparam: The type of the data in database.
member.returns: The data list found in database.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Find``1(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Finds the specified objects with the value of key.
member.typeparam: Specifies the object type of return.
member.param: The key to locate the specified object.
The value of key to locate the specified object.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Find``1(System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Finds the specified objects with the tableName and the value of key.
member.typeparam: Specifies the object type of return.
member.param: The key to locate the specified object.
The value of key to locate the specified object.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Query``1(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Queries data with string of specific query language.
member.typeparam: The type definition of query data.
member.param: The string of specific query language.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Query``1(System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Queries data with string of specific query language.
member.typeparam: The type definition of query data.
member.param: The string of specific query language.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Query``1(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.QueryLogicalOperator)
member.summary: Queries the specified objects with multi-conditions.
member.typeparam: Specifies the object type of return.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Query``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.QueryLogicalOperator)
member.summary: Queries the specified objects with the tableName and multi-conditions.
member.typeparam: Specifies the object type of return.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Insert``1(``0)
member.summary: Inserts data into database.
member.typeparam: The type of table data.
member.param: The data need to be inserted.
member.returns: true if data insert success, false otherwise.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Insert``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Inserts data into database.
member.typeparam: The type of table data.
member.param: The data need to be inserted.
member.returns: true if data insert success, false otherwise.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Dispose
member.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.IBoxDBAdapter.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases unmanaged and - optionally - managed resources.
member.param: true to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: T:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.QueryLogicalOperator
member.summary: Enum that defines the database query logical operator.

member.name: F:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.QueryLogicalOperator.None
member.summary: No query logical operator specified.

member.name: F:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.QueryLogicalOperator.And
member.summary: The query logical operator of And.

member.name: F:ReSharp.Data.IBoxDB.QueryLogicalOperator.Or
member.summary: The query logical operator of Or.
